global_design_principles: Emotion First: Every screen must feel cinematic and expensive.
Contrast: True black (#050505) against warm gold (#D4AF37) for stark elegant contrast.
Zoom In: Large beautiful imagery for vehicle selection, avoid tiny unreadable car icons.
Negative Space: Use p-6 and p-8 for bottom sheets and cards to give breathing room.
No Default Vercel/Stripe look. This is a high-end service, not a SaaS.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-medium text-base rounded-full px-6 py-4 w-full shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.2)] hover:bg-[#C9A961] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37]/50 text-[#D4AF37] font-medium text-base rounded-full px-6 py-4 w-full hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 transition-colors

inputs.text: bg-[#0C0C0C] border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-white/30 focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] transition-all w-full
inputs.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-white/50 mb-2 block

bottom_sheet.wrapper: fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 z-50 bg-[#0C0C0C] border-t border-white/10 rounded-t-3xl p-6 shadow-2xl overflow-y-auto max-h-[85vh]
bottom_sheet.drag_handle: w-12 h-1.5 bg-white/20 rounded-full mx-auto mb-6

bottom_nav.wrapper: fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 z-40 h-20 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/5 flex items-center justify-around px-6 pb-safe

cards.base: bg-[#0C0C0C] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-4 overflow-hidden

hero_map_background.description: Dark luxury map UI of San Francisco for active tracking screens

abstract_gold_bg.description: Abstract elegant gold and black texture for role picker or loading screens

icons.style: Clean, thin stroke (strokeWidth={1.5}) to match luxury feel

screens_to_build.name: AppLaunch_RolePicker
screens_to_build.description: Cinematic first touch. Abstract gold bg. Two massive cards for Rider vs Driver.

screens_to_build.name: Rider_Auth
screens_to_build.description: Login/Signup bottom sheet or glass card.

screens_to_build.name: Rider_HomeBooking
screens_to_build.description: Map bg. Bottom sheet asking 'Where to, Sir/Madam?'. High-end Uber UI.

screens_to_build.name: Rider_VehiclePicker
screens_to_build.description: Carousel or stack of large vehicle cards showing luxury fleet.

screens_to_build.name: Rider_QuotePay
screens_to_build.description: Final review. Price breakdown, Apple Pay button.

screens_to_build.name: Rider_ActiveTrip
screens_to_build.description: Map bg. Moving car icon. Driver profile bottom sheet.

screens_to_build.name: Rider_TripHistory
screens_to_build.description: List of past trips. Elegant list items.

screens_to_build.name: Driver_Auth
screens_to_build.description: Driver specific login. Darker, more utilitarian but still premium.

screens_to_build.name: Driver_ActiveTrip
screens_to_build.description: Turn-by-turn map view wrapper. Passenger details.

screens_to_build.name: Driver_ProfileStats
screens_to_build.description: Driver rating, trips completed, earnings preview.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Router to link these screens for a full prototype flow.
To simulate mobile on desktop, wrap the router content in a phone frame (e.g., max-w-[390px] h-[844px] rounded-[40px] border-[8px] border-zinc-800 overflow-hidden relative shadow-2xl mx-auto mt-10).
DO NOT use raw <input> fields. Build or use Shadcn Input but customized to the dark theme guidelines.
Add motion/framer-motion to the bottom sheets for realistic swipe/open mechanics.
Use Lucide-React for all icons. strokeWidth={1.5}
Install and use Playfair Display from Google Fonts in index.css.
Build the 'Bottom Nav' as a sticky/fixed component for the Rider Home/History/Profile screens.
Do not use generic blue/purple colors anywhere. Strict adherence to #050505, #0C0C0C, and #D4AF37.
Map sections should use the provided hero_map_background image as a background layer, with UI layered on top.
